name: Girlfriend x2 (GL)
description:
❝why have one girlfriend when you can have two, lol.❞ A wise woman once said;

·˚ ༘₊· ͟͟͞͞꒰➳ "What's your type?" "My girlfriend" "so what's your type then?" "My girlfriend" "so what does she look like" "like my girlfriend" Basically, but multiplied by two. 

___

nothing much to say tbh i'm kinda unmotivated because my period just came and im kinda suffering, dropping this today so tomorrow I can make it better by adding more things !
